docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-05-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHREIER, OTTO TRUSTEE OF PHILIPP SCHEIER TRUST
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRAMER, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SCHREIER, OTTO TRUSTEE OF PHILIPP SCHEIER TRUST

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRAMER, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCHREIER, OTTO TRUSTEE OF PHILIPP SCHEIER TRUST THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD FURTHER DAMAGES BECAUSE 1). DEFENDANT HAS COMPENSATED PLAINTIFF FOR PRORATED RENT; AND 2). PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR BUSINESS LOSS WAS DEEMED TO SPECULATIVE TO PERMIT RECOVERY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY KRAMER, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SCHREIER, OTTO TRUSTEE OF PHILIPP SCHEIER TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
